title: Warak Enab Stuffed with Eastern Cheese
description: A Middle Eastern dish where stuffed grape leaves are filled with a tangy cheese blend and served as a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Eastern Cheese
ingredients.notes: crumbly feta or goat cheese works well

instructions: Rinse the grape leaves and remove stems.
In a bowl, mix together Eastern cheese and Tangy cheese.
Add Middle Eastern Spice Blend to the cheese mixture and stir to combine.
Place a grape leaf on a flat surface, vein side up.
Place a tablespoon of the cheese mixture in the center of the grape leaf.
Fold the stem end over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the leaf into a neat package.
Repeat with remaining grape leaves and filling.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat and brush with Olive Oil.
Add the stuffed grape leaves to the skillet, seam side down.
Cook for 5-7 minutes, or until the grape leaves are tender and the filling is heated through.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
